notes: Change LED, I2C, display SPI, and related GPIO pins from the web interface without reflashing (board-dependent limits still apply).
Over-the-air firmware downloads are more tolerant of slow or busy networks, with clearer progress behavior during long downloads.
The Wi-Fi configuration access point is less likely to disappear while the device reconnects to your home network after you change hotspot settings.
Logging is easier to read at a glance when diagnosing issues from Serial or the browser tools.
General reliability fixes from continued testing and review.
